query:
SELECT
            ws.workspace_id as "workspace_id!",
            dt.key as "name!",
            dt.value->>'table_name' as "table_name"
        FROM workspace_settings ws,
             jsonb_each(ws.datatable) dt
        WHERE dt.value->>'resource_type' = 'instance'
          AND dt.value->>'table_name' IS NOT NULL
